aboleth.alt: A huge blue-gray aboleth with three eyes and four tentacles glides through a dark underwater cavern.

adult-black-dragon.alt: A huge adult black dragon stands in a drowned forest, pouring acid from its skull-like jaws.

adult-brass-dragon.alt: A huge adult brass dragon stands across a dune crest with vast wings spread and fire rolling from its jaws.

adult-bronze-dragon.alt: A huge adult bronze dragon rises through crashing surf and fires lightning past a coastal fortress.

adult-copper-dragon.alt: A huge verdigris-patched adult copper dragon climbs headfirst down a red canyon wall.

adult-white-dragon.alt: A huge adult white dragon climbs across broken sea ice while breathing a cone of freezing vapor.

air-elemental.alt: A large humanoid vortex of pale air surges across a rocky plateau amid spiraling leaves and dust.

allosaurus.alt: A dusty olive allosaurus turns across open grassland with jaws spread and its long tail balancing the charge.

animated-armor.alt: An empty dark-steel suit of animated plate armor advances through a castle corridor with raised fists.

animated-flying-sword.alt: An unsupported steel sword darts through a dark armory with faint blue runes glowing along its blade.

animated-rug-of-smothering.alt: A faded crimson animated rug rises from a manor floor, folding its tasseled edges inward to smother prey.

ankheg.alt: A plated ankheg erupts from a grassland burrow, six legs braced as acid gathers between its mandibles.

ankylosaurus.alt: A huge armored ankylosaurus pivots across dusty grassland and swings its massive tail club.

ape.alt: A muscular charcoal ape braces in a forest clearing with one long arm drawn back around a stone.

archelon.alt: A colossal scarred archelon glides over a coastal seabed on four long flippers beneath a broad leathery shell.

archmage.alt: A small elder archmage stands within a clear magical ward while directing bright force bolts.

assassin.alt: A compact hooded assassin lands silently in a dark courtyard with shortsword and light crossbow ready.

awakened-shrub.alt: A small awakened shrub scuttles across a woodland floor on tangled roots with thorny branches raised.

awakened-tree.alt: A huge awakened oak strides through an old forest on lifting roots, one massive branch sweeping forward.

axe-beak.alt: A towering rust-black axe beak charges across grassland on two legs with its huge wedge-shaped bill forward.

azer-sentinel.alt: A bronze azer sentinel guards a black forge gate with fiery hair and a heat-bright hammer held ready.

baboon.alt: A lean gray-brown baboon bounds over a rocky woodland ledge with its long tail arched behind it.

badger.alt: A striped badger braces at the mouth of a forest burrow with soil clinging to its digging claws.

bandit.alt: A small hooded bandit waits beside a lonely road with scimitar drawn and crossbow on their back.

bandit-captain.alt: A compact bandit captain commands a roadside ambush with scimitar extended and a pistol holstered at the waist.

barbed-devil.alt: A thorn-covered barbed devil clings to basalt while gathering fire in one clawed hand.

basilisk.alt: An eight-legged basilisk crawls over cavern rock, bony spurs raised and pale green petrifying eyes fixed forward.

bat.alt: A small charcoal-brown bat banks through the moonlit mouth of a limestone cave.

bearded-devil.alt: A rust-red bearded devil advances along an infernal causeway with barbed facial tendrils and a black glaive.

behir.alt: A twelve-legged blue behir coils down a cavern wall as white lightning gathers in its jaws.

berserker.alt: A compact hide-clad berserker charges across a rocky hill with a nicked greataxe raised overhead.

black-bear.alt: A glossy black bear climbs headfirst down a broad forest tree with curved foreclaws anchored.

black-dragon-wyrmling.alt: A young black dragon crouches on a swamp root, oily wings spread as smoking acid drips from its jaws.

black-pudding.alt: A glossy black pudding spreads across an Underdark floor and wall while a metal grate corrodes beneath it.

blink-dog.alt: A golden blink dog reappears in a running bound on a forest path with a pale afterimage behind it.

blood-hawk.alt: A rust-breasted blood hawk dives above a pine slope with slate wings tucked and talons extended.

blue-dragon-wyrmling.alt: A blue dragon wyrmling rises from a storm-dark dune, single nasal horn high as lightning fills its jaws.

boar.alt: A dark bristled wild boar charges across wet forest earth with curved tusks lowered.

bone-devil.alt: A gaunt bone devil dives through an infernal canyon with its segmented venomous tail thrust forward.

brass-dragon-wyrmling.alt: A young brass dragon stands on a dune with two wings half-open and its broad plated head raised.

bronze-dragon-wyrmling.alt: A bronze dragon wyrmling climbs from a tide pool as white lightning flickers between its swept horns.

brown-bear.alt: A huge grizzled brown bear rises beside a forest river with one broad clawed paw sweeping outward.

bugbear-stalker.alt: A long-armed ochre bugbear stalker steps from forest shadow with morningstar low and javelins on its back.

bugbear-warrior.alt: A hairy bugbear warrior lunges from a forest ravine with one long hand grabbing and a hammer raised.

bulette.alt: An armored bulette bursts from a rocky hillside with jaws open and earth scattering from its digging claws.

camel.alt: A one-humped sand-colored camel strides across a desert track on broad padded feet.

cat.alt: A lean gray tabby cat pauses on a garden wall with one paw raised and green-gold eyes alert.

centaur-trooper.alt: A chestnut centaur trooper advances across a meadow with pike lowered and longbow secured along the flank.

chain-devil.alt: A scarred chain devil stands in an infernal prison as hooked black chains coil and strike around it.

chimera.alt: A three-headed chimera with lion body, goat and dragon heads, wings, and serpent tail leaps from a mountain ledge.

chuul.alt: A blue-green chuul wades from cavern water with massive pincers open and pale mouth tentacles spread.

clay-golem.alt: A massive terracotta clay golem raises both fists in an abandoned courtyard, acidic light glowing through its cracks.

cloaker.alt: A black manta-shaped cloaker drops from a cavern ceiling, exposing its ribbed underside and hooked mouth.

cloud-giant.alt: A regal blue-gray cloud giant hovers above a cloud bridge with a great mace and storm cloud in hand.

cockatrice.alt: A rooster-headed cockatrice flares two leathery wings above its scaled body and long lizard tail.

commoner.alt: A compact adult commoner in patched work clothes holds a plain wooden club defensively in a farmyard.

constrictor-snake.alt: A large olive-and-brown constrictor coils around a mossy trunk with its broad head raised.

copper-dragon-wyrmling.alt: A young copper dragon clings to a red-rock slope with two wings opening and cheek frills visible.

couatl.alt: An iridescent feathered couatl coils in the air with broad wings spread above a misty temple clearing.

crab.alt: A mottled shore crab scuttles sideways over a wet tide-pool rock with one pincer raised.

crocodile.alt: A large olive crocodile surges from a swamp channel with armored back, jaws open, and water spraying.

cultist.alt: A compact hooded cultist advances through a ruined cellar shrine with an iron ritual sickle.

cultist-fanatic.alt: A hooded cultist fanatic grips a dark pact blade as violet necrotic light threads across a ritual glove.

darkmantle.alt: A charcoal darkmantle drops from a cavern ceiling with its broad mantle spread and eight tentacles open.

death-dog.alt: A two-headed rust-black death dog stalks through a desert ruin with both muzzles snarling.

deer.alt: A russet deer pauses mid-step in a dawn forest glade, antlered head turned toward a sound.

deva.alt: A winged deva hovers above pale stone with a radiant mace held protectively across its body.

dire-wolf.alt: A pony-sized silver-gray dire wolf charges along a snowy ridge with jaws open and one broad paw forward.

djinni.alt: A cloud-haired djinni hovers above a coastal terrace with a storm blade and whirlwind coiling around one hand.

doppelganger.alt: An ash-gray doppelganger turns in a narrow alley as a borrowed human face ripples away from its blank true form.

draft-horse.alt: A powerful dark bay draft horse leans into a plain work harness on a muddy village lane.

dretch.alt: A squat gray-green dretch hunches over cracked stone as yellowish fetid vapor gathers around it.

drider.alt: A pale drider clings to an Underdark wall on eight black spider legs while gathering violet poison.

druid.alt: A compact forest druid guides a green-gold wisp beside a vine-wrapped staff in a rain-fresh glade.

dryad.alt: A bark-skinned dryad emerges from an ancient tree while sweeping a thorned vine through the green-lit grove.

dust-mephit.alt: A small gray dust mephit hovers in a ruined hall while blasting a cone of blinding grit.

eagle.alt: A brown-and-cream eagle banks toward a coastal cliff with its broad wings cupped and talons extended.

earth-elemental.alt: A hulking earth elemental rises through fractured granite with a boulder raised in one massive hand.

efreeti.alt: A coal-dark efreeti hovers in a furnace hall with flaming hair, a red-hot blade, and fire in one palm.

elephant.alt: A huge gray elephant strides through dusty grassland with ears spread, trunk curled, and two ivory tusks forward.

elk.alt: A large russet elk drives through a mountain meadow with its broad antler rack lowered.

erinyes.alt: A black-winged erinyes hovers over an infernal tribunal with sword drawn and enchanted rope circling.

ettercap.alt: A bristled ettercap clings sideways to a webbed tree and casts a thick strand from one clawed arm.

ettin.alt: A huge two-headed ettin strides through a hill pass with a battleaxe in one hand and morningstar in the other.

fire-elemental.alt: A towering humanoid-shaped fire elemental surges across blackened ground in a shower of embers.

fire-giant.alt: A colossal charcoal-skinned fire giant in black plate stands in a volcanic forge with a flaming sword.

flesh-golem.alt: A massive stitched flesh golem advances through a ruined workshop as electricity arcs over its shoulders.

flying-snake.alt: A tiny emerald-and-copper flying snake banks through a jungle gap on two feathered wings.

frog.alt: A tiny moss-green frog crouches on a rain-wet leaf beside a forest pool, ready to leap.

frost-giant.alt: A pale-blue frost giant crosses a glacier carrying a huge rimed axe and giant bow.

gargoyle.alt: A dark basalt gargoyle launches from a rain-soaked cathedral ledge with broad stone wings opening.

gelatinous-cube.alt: A transparent gelatinous cube fills a stone corridor, with bubbles and corroded scraps suspended inside.

ghast.alt: A gaunt gray-green ghast lopes through a damp crypt with long black claws and broken teeth bared.

ghost.alt: A pale translucent ghost in tattered garments reaches forward while drifting through a moonlit ruin.

ghoul.alt: A gaunt ash-gray ghoul lunges through a cemetery passage with black claws spread and broken teeth bared.

giant-ape.alt: A colossal dark-furred ape crouches on a forest outcrop with a huge boulder drawn back to throw.

giant-badger.alt: A boar-sized striped giant badger bursts from a forest bank with one massive digging paw raised.

giant-bat.alt: A horse-sized charcoal giant bat sweeps through a cavern on broad veined wings with huge ears raised.

giant-boar.alt: A huge dark-bristled boar charges across torn meadow turf with paired tusks and head lowered.

giant-centipede.alt: A man-long rust-black giant centipede curves across a wet cave wall on dozens of jointed legs.

giant-constrictor-snake.alt: A trunk-thick giant constrictor snake rises from olive coils beside a dark swamp channel.

giant-crab.alt: A giant red-brown crab braces in shallow surf with two massive pincers spread wide.

giant-crocodile.alt: A gigantic scarred crocodile surges from a reed-filled swamp channel with its jaws spread wide.

giant-eagle.alt: A horse-sized celestial eagle banks over a mountain valley with gold-edged wings and talons extended.

giant-elk.alt: A huge russet celestial elk lowers its radiant many-tined antlers on a misty forest rise.

giant-fire-beetle.alt: A large dark fire beetle climbs through a cavern, two orange glands above its eyes lighting the shell.

giant-frog.alt: A wolf-sized mottled giant frog leaps from a swamp bank with webbed feet spread and mouth open.

giant-goat.alt: A horse-sized pale giant goat charges down a mountain ledge with huge ridged horns lowered.

giant-hyena.alt: A horse-sized spotted giant hyena bounds through dry scrub with massive jaws open.

giant-lizard.alt: A massive olive giant lizard clings diagonally to an overgrown ruin wall on four clawed feet.

giant-octopus.alt: A huge red-violet giant octopus rises over a reef ledge with all eight sucker-lined arms spread.

giant-owl.alt: A great cream-and-tawny celestial owl glides over a snowy forest clearing with silver eyes forward.

giant-rat.alt: A terrier-sized brown giant rat creeps over sewer rubble with its thick naked tail curved behind it.

giant-scorpion.alt: A giant amber scorpion braces in a desert ravine with pincers spread and one venomous stinger arched overhead.

giant-seahorse.alt: A horse-sized blue-green giant seahorse charges upright through a clear underwater canyon.

giant-shark.alt: A colossal blue-gray shark turns through deep water, rows of teeth visible in its opening jaws.

giant-spider.alt: A horse-sized dark giant spider hangs sideways in a cavern web on eight long legs.

giant-toad.alt: A bear-sized olive giant toad lands in swamp mud with its warty body low and vast mouth opening.

giant-venomous-snake.alt: A man-long emerald giant viper strikes from a jungle-floor coil with two long fangs exposed.

giant-vulture.alt: A ragged giant vulture dives over a sunlit badland with its hooked beak and talons ready to gouge.

giant-wasp.alt: A man-sized yellow-and-black giant wasp banks through a clearing on four clear wings with stinger lowered.

giant-weasel.alt: A wolf-long chestnut giant weasel flows over a mossy log in a stretched running bound.

giant-wolf-spider.alt: A man-sized hairy wolf spider stalks across a rocky crevice on eight stout legs.

gibbering-mouther.alt: A pallid gibbering mouther rolls across liquefying cavern stone, crowded with chattering mouths and blinking eyes.

glabrezu.alt: A four-armed glabrezu advances across a shattered causeway with two great pincers spread and two fists raised.

gladiator.alt: A compact armored gladiator braces behind a scarred shield with a long spear ready.

gnoll-warrior.alt: A spotted hyena-headed gnoll warrior braces on a scrubland ridge while drawing a pale bone bow.

goat.alt: A cream-and-brown goat picks its way down a rocky hill with curved horns and cloven hooves.

goblin-boss.alt: A small olive-skinned goblin boss directs troops from a stone, scimitar drawn and shortbow on its back.

goblin-minion.alt: A wiry green goblin minion darts from behind a ruined stone with a dagger held close.

goblin-warrior.alt: A small green-skinned goblin warrior crouches on a forest path with scimitar drawn and shortbow ready.

gold-dragon-wyrmling.alt: A gold dragon wyrmling opens its wings beside a meadow river as warm firelight gathers in its throat.

gorgon.alt: An iron-plated bull gorgon lowers its horns as pale petrifying vapor pours from its muzzle.

gray-ooze.alt: A translucent gray ooze creeps down a cavern wall, extending one pseudopod toward rusted metal.

green-dragon-wyrmling.alt: A young green dragon stalks along a mossy forest trunk as poisonous yellow-green vapor curls from its jaws.

green-hag.alt: A moss-green hag stands in shallow swamp water with hooked claws raised beneath tangled iron-gray hair.

grick.alt: A pale eyeless grick clings to a limestone wall, four tentacles spread around its hooked beak.

griffon.alt: A golden-brown griffon launches from a mountain nest, eagle talons raised above powerful lion hindquarters.

grimlock.alt: An eyeless gray grimlock turns toward a cavern sound with a heavy bone cudgel raised.

guard.alt: A compact town guard holds a gateway with a round shield forward and a plain spear ready.

guard-captain.alt: A compact guard captain holds a longsword at a city gate with paired javelins and a muted command sash.

guardian-naga.alt: A golden guardian naga coils across a sanctuary entrance with its crowned head raised and venom shining on its fangs.

half-dragon.alt: An armored half-dragon with dark iridescent scales turns to strike as light gathers in its jaws.

harpy.alt: A storm-gray harpy sings from a coastal cliff with broad feathered wings raised and talons gripping stone.

hawk.alt: A small rust-and-cream hawk turns sharply above a grassland with its barred tail fanned.

hell-hound.alt: A charcoal hell hound charges over black rock as furnace light and flame build inside its open jaws.

hezrou.alt: A hulking toad-faced hezrou lurches through a black planar marsh surrounded by foul greenish vapor.

hill-giant.alt: A huge rough-clad hill giant lumbers downhill carrying an uprooted tree as a club.

hippogriff.alt: A tawny hippogriff lands on a mountain shelf, eagle talons forward and horse hind legs braced beneath wide wings.

hippopotamus.alt: A huge gray-brown hippopotamus surges from a green river with its broad mouth and ivory teeth fully open.

hobgoblin-captain.alt: A rust-red hobgoblin captain stands in ordered dark armor with greatsword ready and longbow on the back.

hobgoblin-warrior.alt: A rust-red hobgoblin warrior in dark lamellar advances with longsword ready and longbow on its back.

homunculus.alt: A tiny clay homunculus hovers over an arcane worktable on broad leathery wings.

horned-devil.alt: A horned devil dives over an infernal rampart with a blazing two-pronged fork and hooked tail.

hunter-shark.alt: A scarred blue-gray hunter shark banks through open coastal water with rows of teeth visible.

hydra.alt: A five-headed hydra wades through a coastal marsh, its long necks striking in separate directions.

hyena.alt: A spotted hyena with heavy shoulders trots through dry grass with its blunt muzzle held low.

ice-devil.alt: A blue-white insectile ice devil braces behind a frozen spear with its segmented tail curled to strike.

ice-mephit.alt: A small blue-white ice mephit hovers above a frozen shelf while exhaling a plume of frost.

imp.alt: A tiny red imp hovers in a dark stone alcove with leathery wings spread and barbed tail raised.

incubus.alt: A dark-winged incubus descends inside a moonlit chamber with violet psychic haze around one reaching hand.

invisible-stalker.alt: A nearly invisible stalker crosses a rainy rooftop, outlined only by warped air, droplets, and spiraling papers.

jackal.alt: A tawny jackal pauses on a dune crest with one paw lifted and tall ears alert.

killer-whale.alt: A huge black-and-white killer whale rolls through cold ocean water beneath the silver surface.

knight.alt: A compact knight in brushed plate guards a castle approach with greatsword ready and heavy crossbow on the back.

kobold-warrior.alt: A small russet-scaled kobold warrior crouches in a mine passage with dagger poised and tail extended.

lamia.alt: A tawny lion-bodied lamia leaps from a desert terrace with its humanoid claw extended in violet corrupting magic.

lemure.alt: A sagging pale lemure drags its shapeless body across cracked infernal stone, leaving oily slime.

lion.alt: A scarred tawny lion strides through dry grass and roars, its dark mane framing a powerful head.

lizard.alt: A mottled olive lizard clings head-down to a sunlit stone wall on widely spread toes.

mage.alt: A compact robed mage casts blue-white bolts of force in a ruined observatory.

magma-mephit.alt: A cracked basalt magma mephit rises over a lava fissure with molten wings spread and fire at its jaws.

magmin.alt: A small wingless magmin of living orange magma strides across black stone with one burning hand extended.

mammoth.alt: A shaggy mammoth charges across an arctic steppe with huge curved tusks and snow flying from its feet.

manticore.alt: A russet manticore crouches on a ridge, leathery wings spread and its spike-filled tail curled to fire.

mastiff.alt: A powerful brindled mastiff steps forward barking in a lamplit stable courtyard.

medusa.alt: A snake-haired medusa turns in a ruined desert sanctuary while projecting a pale green poison ray.

merfolk-skirmisher.alt: A sea-green merfolk skirmisher turns through a kelp channel with a cold-glowing ocean spear.

merrow.alt: A hulking blue-green merrow rises from the seabed with a barbed harpoon drawn back and rope streaming behind.

mimic.alt: A battered dungeon chest twists into a mimic, slick flesh and an adhesive pseudopod breaking through warped boards.

minotaur-of-baphomet.alt: A black-furred minotaur of Baphomet charges through a labyrinth with carved horns and a violet-smoking glaive.

minotaur-skeleton.alt: A towering minotaur skeleton lowers its horned bull skull to charge through a ruined labyrinth.

mule.alt: A dun pack mule climbs a rocky hill trail with long ears forward and balanced canvas bundles.

mummy.alt: A compact linen-wrapped mummy advances through a dusty tomb with one darkened fist raised and glare fixed forward.

nalfeshnee.alt: A tusked, ape-bodied nalfeshnee hovers above shattered stone as a ring of fearful distortion spreads outward.

night-hag.alt: A gaunt indigo night hag parts nightmare mist while clutching a dark soul bag in a moonlit ruin.

nightmare.alt: A coal-black nightmare rears over a dark planar causeway with flaming mane, tail, and all four hooves.

noble.alt: A compact noble in a navy travel coat holds a slender rapier in a poised manor courtyard stance.

ochre-jelly.alt: A glossy ochre jelly pours down a cavern pillar and reaches across the passage with one thick pseudopod.

octopus.alt: A rust-and-gray octopus crawls over a reef stone on eight sucker-lined arms.

ogre.alt: A hulking hide-clad ogre lumbers down a muddy track with a tree-trunk club and javelins on its back.

ogre-zombie.alt: A massive gray ogre zombie staggers through a ruined courtyard with one heavy fist swinging down.

oni.alt: A horned blue oni hovers above a moonlit path with indigo nightmare energy curling from one claw.

otyugh.alt: A three-legged otyugh opens its central jaws while two long tentacles sweep across a subterranean refuse pit.

owl.alt: A small mottled owl glides silently above a branch with broad wings spread and dark eyes forward.

owlbear.alt: A huge brown owlbear lunges through a forest, its owl face and feathered mantle rising from a bear body.

panther.alt: A sleek black panther climbs down a mossy branch, faint rosettes visible around its yellow-green eyes.

pegasus.alt: A white pegasus lifts from a high meadow with four hooves leaving the grass and broad feathered wings descending.

phase-spider.alt: A blue-black phase spider steps through a dungeon wall, its eight-legged rear half fading into violet translucence.

piranha.alt: A silver piranha with a red belly turns through dark river water, triangular teeth visible.

pirate.alt: A small deck pirate flourishes a dagger on a rain-dark ship while loose coat tails whip in the sea wind.

pirate-captain.alt: A compact pirate captain braces on a stormy deck with rapier drawn and a flintlock pistol ready.

plesiosaurus.alt: A slate-blue plesiosaurus banks above a rocky seabed, four flippers driving its long neck toward a school of fish.

polar-bear.alt: A huge frost-clumped polar bear climbs from broken sea ice and raises its narrow head into the wind.

pony.alt: A sturdy chestnut pony trots across a green paddock with its thick cream mane lifting.

priest.alt: A compact blue-robed priest guards with a steel mace while holding a white-gold radiant flame aloft.

priest-acolyte.alt: A compact priest acolyte in simple vestments holds an iron mace while golden radiance gathers in one hand.

pseudodragon.alt: A cat-sized russet pseudodragon perches on a stone rail with two wings open and stinger tail arched.

psychic-gray-ooze.alt: A smoky gray ooze crawls down an Underdark wall as violet psychic ripples pulse through its shapeless body.

pteranodon.alt: A tawny pteranodon banks beside a sea cliff on immense leathery wings, long crest streaming behind.

quasit.alt: A tiny wingless green quasit crouches on cracked stone, horned head raised and claws beginning to blur with magic.

rakshasa.alt: A tiger-headed rakshasa stands in a quiet audience chamber with both unnatural backward hands visible.

rat.alt: A small brown rat sniffs the air beside a cellar crack with its long tail curved behind it.

raven.alt: A glossy black raven lands on a weathered signpost with its broad wings open and beak parted.

red-dragon-wyrmling.alt: A juvenile red dragon crouches on volcanic rock, wings spread and smoke curling from its jaws.

reef-shark.alt: A sleek gray reef shark turns through a clear coral channel with its tall dorsal fin upright.

remorhaz.alt: A huge blue-armored remorhaz erupts from snow, its many legs spread and furnace-red underside steaming.

rhinoceros.alt: A large gray rhinoceros charges across dry grass with its two nasal horns lowered through rising dust.

riding-horse.alt: A saddled bay riding horse canters along a grassland trail with black mane and reins lifted.

roc.alt: A gargantuan dark-feathered roc banks between snowy peaks with one enormous talon extended.

roper.alt: A stone-colored roper reveals one eye and a vertical maw as six tendrils lash across a limestone cave.

rust-monster.alt: A rust-brown rust monster reaches two feathery antennae toward an iron helm in a cavern store.

saber-toothed-tiger.alt: A heavy-shouldered saber-toothed tiger leaps from a rocky shelf with long ivory canines exposed.

sahuagin-warrior.alt: A dark green sahuagin warrior rises from moonlit surf with sharklike head and webbed claws spread.

salamander.alt: A copper-scaled salamander coils on volcanic rock and levels a burning spear through waves of heat.

satyr.alt: A horned satyr springs sideways in a forest glade on two shaggy goat legs and cloven hooves.

scorpion.alt: A sand-colored scorpion raises its segmented tail and spreads two pincers on a desert stone.

scout.alt: A compact hooded scout kneels on a wooded ridge with longbow half-drawn and shortsword at the hip.

sea-hag.alt: A gaunt green sea hag rises from black tidal water, webbed claws spread beneath long seaweed-dark hair.

seahorse.alt: A tiny ochre seahorse anchors its curled tail to sea grass while hovering upright in clear water.

shadow.alt: A tall spectral shadow peels away from a dungeon wall and reaches forward with an elongated dark hand.

shambling-mound.alt: A towering mound of soaked vines and peat shambles through swamp water with tendrils spread wide.

shield-guardian.alt: A towering shield guardian crosses its massive arms protectively in an arcane archive.

shrieker-fungus.alt: A pale shrieker fungus opens its quivering purple-gray cap in a damp subterranean cavern.

silver-dragon-wyrmling.alt: A silver dragon wyrmling perches above mountain clouds as frost gathers along its elegant jaws.

skeleton.alt: An animated humanoid skeleton advances through a ruin with shortsword raised and shortbow on its back.

specter.alt: A blue-black specter dives through a ruined wall, its hollow face and reaching hand emerging from torn vapor.

sphinx-of-lore.alt: A human-headed Sphinx of Lore sits in a desert archive as golden symbols gather around its measured roar.

sphinx-of-wonder.alt: A tiny cream-and-gold sphinx of wonder hovers over a stone tablet with feathered wings spread in discovery.

spider.alt: A tiny brown spider hangs beneath a silver web strand with eight legs spread toward a vibration.

spirit-naga.alt: A dark-scaled spirit naga rises from its coils in a buried shrine as violet necrotic light gathers near its face.

sprite.alt: A hand-high sprite hovers beside a fern on transparent wings with a needle sword and tiny bow.

spy.alt: A compact hooded spy climbs a moonlit parapet with a hand crossbow ready and shortsword concealed at the hip.

steam-mephit.alt: A small pale steam mephit hovers in a wet grotto with two wings spread and scalding mist at its jaws.

stirge.alt: A bat-sized stirge approaches on two veined wings with four pincer-tipped legs open and a long proboscis forward.

stone-giant.alt: A lean slate-skinned stone giant draws back a boulder in a vast mountain cavern.

stone-golem.alt: A massive dark stone golem launches a pale force bolt while swinging one slab fist in a ruined courtyard.

storm-giant.alt: A colossal violet-gray storm giant hovers above a sea cliff with a thunderous sword and lightning in hand.

succubus.alt: A poised horned succubus with dark wings extends one hand in a shadowed infernal salon.

swarm-of-bats.alt: Dozens of small brown bats spiral from a cave in a broad coordinated swarm.

swarm-of-crawling-claws.alt: Dozens of desiccated crawling claws spill down a crypt stair in a coordinated wave of hooked fingers.

swarm-of-insects.alt: A dense mixed swarm of beetles and flies rolls over a low ruin wall in a dark shifting wave.

swarm-of-piranhas.alt: A dense swarm of silver and red piranhas wheels through a murky river beneath submerged roots.

swarm-of-rats.alt: Scores of brown and gray rats pour around a damp dungeon corner in a low packed swarm.

swarm-of-ravens.alt: A loud swarm of glossy black ravens spirals above a marsh ruin with many beaks open.

swarm-of-venomous-snakes.alt: Dozens of olive, tan, and rust venomous snakes pour over a fallen log with several heads raised.

tiger.alt: A large orange-and-black tiger stalks silently from dense green leaves with one paw raised.

tough.alt: A compact street tough braces in a stone alley with an iron mace raised and heavy crossbow on the back.

tough-boss.alt: A compact armored tough boss commands a barricaded alley with warhammer and heavy crossbow ready.

treant.alt: An ancient treant strides from an old forest, raising one vast branch arm as bark shards fly.

triceratops.alt: A huge three-horned triceratops lowers its broad frill and charges across a dusty grassland.

troll.alt: A long-armed moss-colored troll twists to rend in a damp ravine, pale regrowth visible along one forearm.

troll-limb.alt: A severed green-gray troll forearm crawls across a cavern floor on five claws, its stump sealed by new tissue.

tyrannosaurus-rex.alt: A huge olive-brown tyrannosaurus turns at a run with jaws open and long tail held for balance.

unicorn.alt: A radiant white unicorn rears protectively beside a forest spring, its single spiraled horn aglow.

vampire.alt: A pale vampire walks down a moonlit manor wall as one hand gathers grave force and the other turns to mist.

vampire-familiar.alt: A pale vampire familiar springs from a moonlit manor wall with two shadow-wreathed daggers and more blades concealed.

vampire-spawn.alt: A pale vampire spawn clings to a moonlit stone wall, claws spread and fangs visible.

venomous-snake.alt: A small olive viper coils in woodland leaves with its triangular head raised and fangs visible.

violet-fungus.alt: A violet mushroom creature lashes four long tendrils from its rooted base in a damp cavern.

vrock.alt: A ragged-winged vrock lands on a blasted crag, shrieking as dark spores shake from its feathers.

vulture.alt: A dark vulture lands on a dry ridge with broad wings raised around its bare gray-pink head.

warhorse.alt: A powerful black warhorse charges riderless across a field in a reinforced military saddle.

warhorse-skeleton.alt: An animated warhorse skeleton gallops across a ruined causeway with cold light in its empty sockets.

warrior-infantry.alt: A compact infantry warrior braces behind a tall wooden shield with a plain spear leveled.

warrior-veteran.alt: A compact scarred warrior veteran stands in repaired armor with greatsword guarded and heavy crossbow on the back.

water-elemental.alt: A towering water elemental curls like a breaking wave above a stormy rocky shore.

weasel.alt: A slender chestnut weasel rises beside a tree root with forepaws tucked and nose lifted.

werebear.alt: A compact werebear rises into a clawing attack on a cold forest slope with a handaxe in one fist.

wereboar.alt: A bristled wereboar in hybrid form charges along a muddy woodland track with a javelin raised.

wererat.alt: A small gray-brown wererat crouches on a cellar beam with hand crossbow aimed and naked tail wrapped for balance.

weretiger.alt: A striped weretiger in agile hybrid form stalks through tall grass with a longbow on its back.

werewolf.alt: A compact gray werewolf crouches on a moonlit hill with claws forward and a longbow across its back.

white-dragon-wyrmling.alt: A white dragon wyrmling scrambles across an ice ridge as frost vapor gathers before its horned jaws.

wight.alt: A pale-eyed wight emerges from a barrow in dark armor with necrotic sword drawn and bow on its shoulder.

will-o-wisp.alt: A tiny blue-white will-o-wisp hovers above black marsh water, trailing mist and a sharp electrical filament.

winter-wolf.alt: A huge white winter wolf braces on an arctic ridge as cyan frost gathers inside its jaws.

wolf.alt: A lean gray wolf trots along a snowy forest edge with amber eyes fixed ahead.

worg.alt: A horse-sized black-gray worg prowls down a forest path with a massive head and coarse mane low.

wraith.alt: A small hooded wraith glides through a black stone passage with one spectral hand reaching forward.

wyvern.alt: A two-legged wyvern dives through a mountain ravine with wings spread and venomous tail stinger curled forward.

xorn.alt: A three-armed, three-legged xorn rises through a crystal cavern floor toward a vein of ore.

young-black-dragon.alt: A young black dragon climbs from a swamp pool as smoking acid gathers along its skull-like jaws.

young-blue-dragon.alt: A young cobalt blue dragon rises from a dune as lightning branches around its great nasal horn.

young-brass-dragon.alt: A young brass dragon bursts from a desert dune with broad wings opening and fire glowing in its throat.

young-bronze-dragon.alt: A young bronze dragon climbs from stormy surf as blue-white lightning gathers between its jaws.

young-copper-dragon.alt: A young copper dragon clings to a sandstone bluff, verdigris touching its bright scales.

young-gold-dragon.alt: A young gold dragon lands in a meadow, its long body and barbels lit by fire gathering in its throat.

young-green-dragon.alt: A young green dragon coils among ancient roots while yellow-green poison mist drifts from its jaws.

young-red-dragon.alt: A young red dragon spreads its dark wings on a volcanic shelf as smoke pours from ember-lit jaws.

young-silver-dragon.alt: A young silver dragon perches above mountain clouds as cold mist gathers around its broad horned head.

young-white-dragon.alt: A young white dragon clings to a fractured glacier as frost gathers around its open jaws.

zombie.alt: A pallid zombie in torn clothes lurches down an abandoned village lane with one rigid hand reaching.
